title: Introducing our first community hour: all about automations!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone!

We are excited to introduce community hour! We created this time as an opportunity for members of our community to be able to take skills to the next level, learn and ask questions.

Automations newbie? Looking to level up your automation game. Not even sure what automation is? Get ready and submit your questions before since this event is all about helping our community get the most out of the monday.com platform.

Register for our first community hour in the link below and make sure to submit questions or post them below!
